note: Extracted by the AI parser from verified parenting sources. Deals change; the app shows a Verify button so a local parent can confirm in person.

deals.name: Moe's Southwest Grill
deals.deal: Kids eat free with an adult meal, all day
deals.note: Available at most Nassau/Suffolk Moe's. Dine-in.

deals.name: American Beauty Bistro
deals.deal: Kids free with an adult entree, 4pm to 9pm

deals.name: Tap Room
deals.deal: Family Night: kids 12 and under free with a $15+ food item, all day
deals.note: Limit two kids per table. Kids menu comes with crayons.

deals.name: Miller's Ale House
deals.deal: Kids eat free with a $10 purchase
deals.note: Limit two kids per adult. Ages vary.

deals.name: IKEA Restaurant
deals.deal: Kids eat free Wednesdays: 2 kids' meals with an adult entree
deals.note: Requires a free IKEA Family membership. Ages 12 & under. In the in-store Swedish Restaurant.

deals.name: Your Mother's House Kitchen & Bar
deals.deal: Kids under 10 free with an adult entree
deals.note: Kids menu: grilled cheese, corn dogs, mac and cheese, tenders.

deals.name: Rath Park
deals.deal: Playground, wading pool and sports fields
deals.note: Town of Hempstead park. Wading pool and programs run seasonally. District residency may apply.

deals.name: Kids Bowl Free
deals.deal: 2 free bowling games every day, all summer
deals.note: Sign up once at kidsbowlfree.com. Most centers Mon-Sat, ~May to Sept. Ages vary (often up to 15). Shoe rental not included.

deals.name: Concert at Rath Park
deals.deal: Free outdoor concert + kids' block party
deals.loc: Rath Park, 849 Fenworth Blvd, Franklin Square
deals.note: Town of Hempstead Neighborhood Concert Series. Free admission. Friday block party starts at 6pm with inflatable games for the kids, a food truck, and an ice cream truck; live music at 7:30pm. Bring a lawn chair or blanket.

deals.name: Concert at Rath Park
deals.loc: Rath Park, 849 Fenworth Blvd, Franklin Square
deals.note: Town of Hempstead Neighborhood Concert Series. Free admission, music at 7:30pm. Bring a lawn chair or blanket; food trucks on site.

deals.name: Concert at Rath Park
deals.deal: Free outdoor concert + kids' block party
deals.loc: Rath Park, 849 Fenworth Blvd, Franklin Square
deals.note: Town of Hempstead Neighborhood Concert Series. Free admission. Thursday block party starts at 6pm with inflatable games for the kids, a food truck, and an ice cream truck; live music at 7:30pm. Bring a lawn chair or blanket.

deals.name: Long Island Children's Museum
deals.deal: Free with a library museum pass
deals.note: One of the best kids' spots on Long Island: 14 hands-on exhibits, live theater, and play areas for ages 1 to 12. Get in free by borrowing a museum pass from your local library; reserve ahead and bring your library card. Open to the public Tuesday to Sunday.

deals.name: Cradle of Aviation Museum
deals.deal: Free with a library museum pass
deals.note: Planes, rockets, and a space gallery kids love. Many local libraries lend a free museum pass (often 2 adults and 2 kids); reserve through your library and bring your card. Check museum hours before you go.

deals.name: Nassau County Museum of Art Sculpture Park
deals.note: The outdoor Sculpture Park, formal gardens, and walking trails are free to roam (indoor gallery admission is separate). Big outdoor sculptures and open lawns, a lovely free stroll with the kids.

deals.name: Hofstra University Sculpture Garden
deals.note: A free, open-air sculpture collection across the Hofstra campus, close to home in Hempstead. The museum offers free kids' activity packets to explore the art.
